hero.title: Elevate Your Workforce Management
hero.subtitle: Payroll, attendance, compliance, and employee self-service — all in one platform built for Sri Lankan businesses.

problems.title: Sound familiar?
problems.subtitle: Every growing business hits these walls. WageX was built to break through them.
problems.p1: Spending days every month calculating salaries on spreadsheets?
problems.p2: Biometric or fingerprint machines with data going absolutely nowhere?
problems.p3: Employees calling HR for every payslip, leave balance, or attendance record?
problems.p4: EPF and ETF forms filled out by hand every single month?
problems.p5: Salary advances tracked on sticky notes, deducted manually each month?
problems.p6: Leave requests buried in WhatsApp chats and email threads?

features.title: One platform. Every answer.
features.subtitle: From the first clock-in to the final statutory submission — WageX handles it all, so you don't have to.

payroll.title: Payroll That Runs Itself
payroll.desc: Generate salaries for your entire team in one click. EPF, ETF, overtime, no-pay, and deductions calculated automatically — with zero errors.

attendance.title: WageX Biometric Device
attendance.desc: The most affordable fingerprint device built for WageX. Set it up in minutes, syncs instantly — no IT knowledge, no complexity, just works.

selfservice.title: Employees Handle Their Own
selfservice.desc: Your team can download payslips, apply for leave, check their attendance, and update their profile — without calling HR once.

statutory.title: Compliance Without the Paperwork
statutory.desc: EPF and ETF contribution forms generated automatically every month. Correct figures, correct format — ready to submit.

advances.title: Advances, Without the Chaos
advances.desc: Issue salary advances and set a repayment schedule. WageX automatically deducts the right amount each payroll cycle — no chasing.

leaves.title: Leaves That Flow Into Payroll
leaves.desc: Employees apply online. Managers approve in one click. Leave balances, no-pay deductions, and accruals automatically reflect in the next payslip.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Ready to stop doing payroll by hand? We'd love to show you what WageX can do for your business.
